---
title: "Online audio cutter"
description: "A small Dash web service that extracts audio clips from pre-defined videos by time interval. Built to feed source material into the Soundboard app."
date: 2023-10-01
categories: [Personal, Web, Python]
image: ../assets/img/projects/audio-cutter.png
---

::: {.eyebrow}
Personal project
:::

<picture>
  <source srcset="../assets/img/projects/audio-cutter.webp" type="image/webp">
  <img src="../assets/img/projects/audio-cutter.png" alt="Online audio cutter UI" style="width:100%; max-width:680px; height:auto; border:1px solid #30363d; border-radius:4px;">
</picture>

## Idea

A web service for extracting audio clips by time interval from a curated
set of videos. Built to feed source material into the
[Soundboard app](soundboard.qmd) without round-tripping through a desktop
editor every time I wanted a new clip.

## Implementation

Dash front-end and back-end. Previously submitted requests are listed on
the right pane and remain available for download, so iterating on a clip
across several attempts doesn't lose history.

## Stack

Python, Dash.

[GitHub repository →](https://github.com/mizaimao/audio_cutter){.external}
